prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:

```pddl
(register_entity_exposure operating_unit_1)
(register_entity_exposure trading_unit_1)
(register_entity_exposure treasury_desk_main)
(register_entity_exposure treasury_desk_secondary)
(assign_funding_source_to_entity operating_unit_1 funding_source_internal_pool)
(assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity operating_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1)

(confirm_external_channel_for_trading_unit trading_unit_1 external_funding_channel_repo treasury_controller_1)
(construct_funding_allocation_with_internal_measure_flag operating_unit_1 trading_unit_1 internal_funding_channel_intercompany external_funding_channel_repo funding_allocation_slot_1)
(release_cash_flow_need_assignment trading_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity operating_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(mark_funding_allocation_assets_mobilized funding_allocation_slot_1 operating_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(release_cash_flow_need_assignment operating_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity treasury_desk_main cash_flow_need_1)
(triage_entity_for_funding treasury_desk_main cash_flow_need_1)
(release_cash_flow_need_assignment treasury_desk_main cash_flow_need_1)
(reserve_liquid_asset_for_allocation treasury_desk_main liquid_asset_gov_bond_1 funding_allocation_slot_1)
(allocate_contingency_credit_line_to_treasury_desk treasury_desk_main contingency_credit_line_a)
(assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity treasury_desk_main cash_flow_need_1)

(bind_funding_strategy_to_treasury_desk treasury_desk_main funding_strategy_priority_internal_first)
(unassign_treasury_controller_from_entity trading_unit_1 treasury_controller_1)
(assign_treasury_controller_to_entity treasury_desk_main treasury_controller_1)
(stage_treasury_desk_for_execution treasury_desk_main funding_strategy_priority_internal_first treasury_controller_1 liquid_asset_gov_bond_1 funding_allocation_slot_1)
(bind_regulatory_exception_to_treasury_desk treasury_desk_main regulatory_exception_waiver_1)
(confirm_execution_and_set_governance_flag_with_internal_flag treasury_desk_main regulatory_exception_waiver_1 liquid_asset_gov_bond_1 funding_allocation_slot_1)
(release_cash_flow_need_assignment treasury_desk_main cash_flow_need_1)
(assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity operating_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(finalize_internal_channel_activation_for_operating_unit operating_unit_1 internal_funding_channel_intercompany cash_flow_need_1 liquidity_measure_asset_sale)
(bind_operational_resource_to_treasury_desk treasury_desk_main operational_resource_settlement_window_morning)
(release_cash_flow_need_assignment operating_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity treasury_desk_main cash_flow_need_1)
(execute_treasury_desk_final_checks treasury_desk_main operating_unit_1 trading_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1 operational_resource_settlement_window_morning)
(confirm_treasury_desk_execution treasury_desk_main)
(grant_funding_permission_to_operating_unit operating_unit_1 funding_allocation_slot_1)
(grant_funding_permission_to_trading_unit trading_unit_1 funding_allocation_slot_1)
(release_cash_flow_need_assignment treasury_desk_main cash_flow_need_1)
(assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity operating_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(issue_funding_instruction_to_entity operating_unit_1 stress_scenario_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(fund_operating_unit_via_source operating_unit_1 funding_source_internal_pool stress_scenario_1)
(release_cash_flow_need_assignment operating_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity trading_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(issue_funding_instruction_to_entity trading_unit_1 stress_scenario_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(fund_trading_unit_via_source trading_unit_1 funding_source_bank_a stress_scenario_1)
(release_cash_flow_need_assignment trading_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity treasury_desk_main cash_flow_need_1)
(issue_funding_instruction_to_entity treasury_desk_main stress_scenario_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(fund_treasury_desk_via_source treasury_desk_main funding_source_bank_b stress_scenario_1)
(assign_funding_source_to_entity treasury_desk_secondary funding_source_internal_pool)
(release_cash_flow_need_assignment treasury_desk_main cash_flow_need_1)
(assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity treasury_desk_secondary cash_flow_need_1)
(triage_entity_for_funding treasury_desk_secondary cash_flow_need_1)
(reserve_liquid_asset_for_allocation treasury_desk_secondary liquid_asset_cash_reserve_1 funding_allocation_slot_1)
(allocate_contingency_credit_line_to_treasury_desk treasury_desk_secondary contingency_credit_line_b)
(apply_authority_and_resource_bindings treasury_desk_secondary liquid_asset_cash_reserve_1 funding_allocation_slot_1 cash_flow_need_1 contingency_credit_line_b)
(unbind_funding_strategy_from_treasury_desk treasury_desk_main funding_strategy_priority_internal_first)
(bind_funding_strategy_to_treasury_desk treasury_desk_secondary funding_strategy_priority_internal_first)
(unassign_treasury_controller_from_entity treasury_desk_main treasury_controller_1)
(assign_treasury_controller_to_entity treasury_desk_secondary treasury_controller_1)
(stage_treasury_desk_for_execution treasury_desk_secondary funding_strategy_priority_internal_first treasury_controller_1 liquid_asset_cash_reserve_1 funding_allocation_slot_1)
(unbind_regulatory_exception_from_treasury_desk treasury_desk_main regulatory_exception_waiver_1)
(bind_regulatory_exception_to_treasury_desk treasury_desk_secondary regulatory_exception_waiver_1)
(confirm_execution_and_set_governance_flag_with_internal_flag treasury_desk_secondary regulatory_exception_waiver_1 liquid_asset_cash_reserve_1 funding_allocation_slot_1)
(bind_operational_resource_to_treasury_desk treasury_desk_secondary operational_resource_settlement_window_evening)
(execute_treasury_desk_final_checks treasury_desk_secondary operating_unit_1 trading_unit_1 cash_flow_need_1 operational_resource_settlement_window_evening)
(confirm_treasury_desk_execution treasury_desk_secondary)
(issue_funding_instruction_to_entity treasury_desk_secondary stress_scenario_1 cash_flow_need_1)
(fund_treasury_desk_via_source treasury_desk_secondary funding_source_internal_pool stress_scenario_1)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem involves a liquidity stress response in a finance treasury domain. The goal is to protect the liquidity of operating_unit_1, trading_unit_1, treasury_desk_main, and treasury_desk_secondary.


## Addressing liquidity stress

- The task focuses on managing a liquidity stress response in the finance treasury domain.
- The goal is to safeguard liquidity for operating_unit_1, trading_unit_1, treasury_desk_main, and treasury_desk_secondary.

## Addressing liquidity stress
- Entities include operating_unit_1 and trading_unit_1 (entity_subgroup_a, legal_entities) and treasury_desk_main/secondary (entity_subgroup_b, also legal_entities).
- Goal is to achieve entity_liquidity_protected for all four, requiring actions like fund_operating_unit_via_source and fund_treasury_desk_via_source.

## Managing funding processes
- Funding permission requires issue_funding_instruction_to_entity, needing funding_permission_granted, entity_assigned_cash_flow_need, and stress_scenario_available.
- Only one cash_flow_need_1 exists, so it must be assigned, triaged, and released for reuse across entities, using assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity and release_cash_flow_need_assignment.

## Handling entity operations
- Entities need exposure identified via register_entity_exposure, then assign_funding_source_to_entity and assign_cash_flow_need_to_entity, followed by triage.
- Funding sources (internal_pool, bank_a, bank_b) and treasury_controller_1 are limited, requiring sequential assignment and release for reuse across entities.

## Exploring funding permissions
- Operating and trading units need grant_funding_permission_to_operating_unit, requiring ready_for_allocation, channel_validated, reserved funding, and mobilized assets.
- Treasury desks use finalize_treasury_desk_confirmation or confirm_treasury_desk_execution, offering execution or delegation paths for funding_permission_granted.

## Sequencing entity funding

- The process per entity involves registering exposure, assigning a funding source, assigning cash_flow_need_1, and triaging, in that order.
- Since only one cash_flow_need_1 exists, it must be assigned, triaged, and released for reuse across entities like operating_unit_1 and trading_unit_1.

## Planning resource allocation

- Funding sources (internal_pool, bank_a, bank_b) are limited to three, but four entities need funding, requiring sequential assignment and release after funding.
- Stress_scenario_1 is singular and must be reused by funding entities one at a time to achieve entity_liquidity_protected for all.

## Evaluating channel activation paths

- Activating internal channels for operating units (ou) requires a triaged ou, assigned treasury controller, and internal channel ready, setting ou_ready_for_allocation and ou_channel_validated without needing cash flow need (cfn).
- Activating external channels for trading units (tu) requires assigned cfn, setting the channel ready, then confirming sets tu_ready_for_allocation and validated, also needing a treasury controller.

## Analyzing liquidity measure usage

- Attaching liquidity measure (lm) to channels sets ready_for_allocation and measure_attached without cfn, but only one lm (liquidity_measure_asset_sale) is available, requiring sequential use.
- Finalizing with lm needs cfn and allocated_lm, setting channels ready and validated, releasing lm after, enabling sequencing for multiple entities.

## Exploring funding allocation construction

- Constructing funding allocation (fa) with internal measure flag requires ou_ready_for_allocation, tu_ready_for_allocation, internal measure_attached, and external_channel_ready, without needing all channels validated.
- This allows parallelism, as tu can be validated via external channel activation and confirmation, while ou uses lm attachment, though treasury controller limits sequential processing.

## Continuing funding allocation planning

- Preparing liquid asset mobilization requires a triaged treasury desk (td) with assigned cash flow need (cfn) and liquid assets (la) reserved, setting strategy based on flags.
- Applying authority for funding allocation (fa) needs td with assigned cfn, internal measure flag, and allocated credit capacity limit (ccl), setting strategy and validating authority.

## Exploring treasury desk sequencing

- Binding a funding strategy to a treasury desk requires the desk to be triaged and the strategy available, but only one funding strategy (fsy) exists, needing sequential use.
- Staging and finalizing funding involves setting execution readiness and governance, with delegation paths requiring assigned cfn to minimize conflicts.

## Planning entity funding sequence

- Register exposure for all entities (operating_unit_1, trading_unit_1, treasury_desk_main, treasury_desk_secondary) first, as there are no precondition conflicts.
- With only three funding sources (fs) initially available for four entities, sequencing is needed: assign fs to three entities, fund one to release fs, then assign to the next, resolving circular dependencies.

## Managing treasury controller assignment

- Unassigning treasury controller from trading_unit_1 makes it available for reassignment.  
- Assigning treasury controller to treasury_desk_main enables staging for execution.  

## Staging treasury desk execution

- Staging treasury_desk_main for execution requires a bound strategy, assigned controller, and no external measure flag.  
- This process sets the desk as prepared, allowing further steps like binding regulatory exceptions.  

## Binding regulatory exceptions

- Binding a regulatory exception to treasury_desk_main requires it to be triaged and the exception available.  
- This step prepares the desk for confirming execution with internal measures, ensuring governance readiness.  

## Confirming execution readiness

- Confirming execution for treasury_desk_main sets it as execution_ready and governance_confirmed, needing a bound regulatory exception.  
- This step is critical for finalizing treasury desk operations, but requires prior validation of operating units.  

## Preparing operational resource allocation

- Binding an operational resource to treasury_desk_main requires execution readiness and governance confirmation.  
- This enables allocation for final checks, but operating_unit_1 must be validated first to proceed.

## Continuing operational resource allocation

- Assigning a cash flow need to treasury_desk_main enables issuing funding instructions under stress_scenario_1, with treasury_desk_main authorized and the scenario bound.
- Funding treasury_desk_main via funding_source_bank_b protects it, using an available funding source and stress scenario, leaving all funding sources available.

## Managing treasury desk secondary triage

- Treasury_desk_secondary needs triage, requiring a cash flow need; releasing it from treasury_desk_main makes it available for assignment.
- After assigning the cash flow need and triaging, treasury_desk_secondary is prepared for further funding steps, with funding_source_internal_pool available.

## Reserving assets for treasury desk secondary

- Reserving liquid_asset_cash_reserve_1 for treasury_desk_secondary is possible, as it’s available and not yet reserved, linking to funding_allocation_slot_1.
- Allocating contingency_credit_line_b to treasury_desk_secondary sets up authority and resource bindings, validating strategy for the desk.

## Adjusting funding strategy bindings

- Unbinding funding_strategy_priority_internal_first from treasury_desk_main makes it available, as it’s no longer needed after execution confirmation.
- Binding the funding strategy to treasury_desk_secondary ensures it has the necessary strategy for operations, completing the funding sequence.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
